about.hero_title_html:
We hunt down
what's going viral
so you don't have to
about.hero_lede_html: You live on TikTok, spot some insane product… and then it vanishes into a thousand videos. We track it down, test it, and have it ready to ship to you fast. That's Fstore.
about.story_title: It started with an endless scroll
about.story_p1: Back in 2021 we were just like you: saving videos of products that looked like magic, then spending half an hour hunting for where to buy them without waiting six weeks for them to ship from the other side of the world.
about.story_p2_html: So we built Fstore: one spot to find whatever everyone's watching on TikTok, already curated, tested, and in stock. No endless waits. No surprises.
about.story_p3: These days our team scans hundreds of trends a week and only keeps what's actually worth it. If we sell it, it's because we'd buy it ourselves.
about.value1_body: We scan hundreds of trends every week and only bring in what's actually worth it. Quality over quantity, always.
about.value2_body: No six-week waits. We've got the product right here and it lands at your door fast, with tracking.
about.value3_body: 30 days to return, encrypted checkout, and support over chat. If something's off, we fix it.
about.steps_title: From TikTok to your door in 4 steps
about.step1_body: We live on TikTok and Instagram to catch what's about to blow up.
about.step2_body: We order samples and check it lives up to what the video promises.
about.step3_body: We lock in stock so we can ship it to you in days, not weeks.
about.step4_body: Order it in 2 taps from your phone and get it fast.
about.team_subtitle: Real people obsessed with finding you the next big thing
about.cta_subtitle: Discover the products going off all over socials this week.

product.search_placeholder: Search what you saw on TikTok…
product.feat_1_desc: Sucks up crumbs, dust and pet hair in seconds. 3-in-1 nozzle.
product.feat_2_desc: USB-C rechargeable battery. Up to 30 min of nonstop use.
product.feat_3_desc: Car, desk, couch, keyboard. Lightweight and pocket-sized.
product.feat_4_desc: Powerful but low-key. Use it without bugging anyone.
product.tiktok_views: 8M+ views of this product · tap to watch
product.review_1_body: Bought it off TikTok thinking it was a gimmick… nope! Sucks like crazy for how tiny it is. My car is spotless now.
product.review_2_body: Showed up in 2 days. Way better quality than I expected for the price. Battery easily lasts for the desk and keyboard.
product.review_3_body: Really good and super cute in white. Knocking off one star just because I wish it came with more nozzles, but it nails it.
product.faq_1_a: We keep everything in stock. Orders confirmed before 4pm ship the same day. Standard delivery is fast with tracking included, plus an express option.
product.faq_2_q: Can I return it if I'm not into it?
product.faq_2_a: Yep. You've got 30 days to return it, no questions asked. We refund you in full as soon as we get the product back.
product.faq_3_a: Every product comes with a 1-year warranty. If something breaks, we swap it free of charge.
product.faq_4_a: Yes, every payment is encrypted (SSL). We take Visa, Mastercard, PayPal and Apple Pay.
product.footer_tagline: Everything blowing up on TikTok right now

landing.hero_desc_fallback: The one that keeps showing up on your For You… now with insane suction, totally cordless, and at a price that's basically a joke. It's going viral for a reason.
landing.problem_1: Crumbs in the couch and car that a rag just won't grab.
landing.problem_2: Dragging out the big vacuum for 4 crumbs is a whole ordeal.
landing.problem_4: Corners, keyboards and bags that are impossible to clean.
landing.problem_outro_html: There's an easier way. And you've seen it on your For You.
landing.feature_desc_1: Crumbs, dust, sand and hair gone in seconds. 3-in-1 nozzle.
landing.feature_desc_2: Up to 30 min cable-free. Fast charging.
landing.feature_desc_3: Glovebox, drawer or bag. Weighs basically nothing.
landing.feature_desc_4: Cleans up without making a scene.
landing.step_desc_1: One button. Ready instantly, no plugs.
landing.step_desc_2: Run it wherever you want: car, couch, desk…
landing.step_desc_3: Removable bin. Cleans out in seconds.
landing.review_body_1: Bought it off TikTok not expecting much… and wow, what a find! My car looks spotless. It suctions like crazy.
landing.review_body_2: Showed up in 2 days. Way better quality than I expected. I use it on my keyboard and desk every single day.
landing.review_body_3: Super handy and cute in white. The battery lasts way more than enough. Getting another one to gift.
landing.offer_subtitle: The more you grab, the more you save. Free shipping on every pack.
landing.guarantee_body: If you don't fall in love, send it back, no questions asked, and we refund you 100%. The risk is all on us.
landing.faq_a_1: We keep everything in stock. Orders before 4 PM ship the same day. Standard delivery is fast with tracking, plus an express option.
landing.faq_q_2: What if I don't like it?
landing.faq_a_2: You've got 30 days to return it, no explanation needed. We refund you 100% once it's back with us.
landing.faq_q_3: How long does the battery last?
landing.faq_a_3: Up to 30 minutes of continuous use. Recharges via USB-C in about 2.5 hours.
landing.faq_a_4: Yes, every payment is SSL-encrypted. We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal and Apple Pay.
landing.final_title_html:
Don't wait for it
to sell out again
landing.final_subtitle: Over 2,800 people grabbed one this week. Only a few left at -50%.
